title: Enable dotnetUseGlobalJson in Azure pipeline
body:
This pull request introduces a small configuration update to the Azure pipeline YAML file. The change ensures that the pipeline uses the `global.json` file for .NET version management, improving consistency across builds.

* Added `dotnetUseGlobalJson: true` to the `stages:` section in `scripts/azure-templates-stages-package.yml`, ensuring .NET version alignment with the project's `global.json`.
